title: Lesson 958: 決まる, 記名, 脚色...

items.gloss: to be decided; to be settled; to be fixed; to be arranged; to be unchanging; to be the same (as always); to be set; to be a fixed rule; to be destined; to be a convention; to be a custom; to be common knowledge; to be well executed (of a manoeuvre in a sport, game, etc.); to go well; to succeed; to connect (of a punch); to look good (of clothing); to look sharp; to be stylish; to suit one; to be held in place (of a hairdo); to be struck and held (of a pose in kabuki)
signature; register; to put one's name on; to sign; stamped name; typed name
dramatization (e.g. of a novel); dramatisation; adaptation; dramatization; embellishment; exaggeration; embroidery
agreement; rules; code; protocol; convention; bylaw
